summary_translated: 以往关于基于RAG的对话系统中记忆机制的研究多聚焦于记忆的存储与检索方式，但对具有不同功能角色的记忆如何影响响应质量仍知之甚少。具体而言，这些记忆如何在不同对话情境下塑造智能体的回应行为，是否导致实质性不同的响应模式。现有对话系统的评估方法也多依赖参考答案，难以捕捉响应中可能体现用户偏好差异的细微差别。本文深入探究不同记忆类型对智能体响应的影响。我们提出了一种细粒度的对话记忆分类体系，将检索到的记忆划分为不同角色类型，并设计了一个以用户为中心的评估框架，模拟用户视角。通过对长期数据集和前沿大模型的对比实验，我们的分析揭示了记忆类型的多种差异化影响：例如，澄清性记忆能提升响应的事实准确性与约束意识，使其更正确且个性化；无关记忆则降低话题相关性并削弱约束意识。尽管前沿大模型能力强大，这些发现揭示了如何利用不同记忆类型生成更个性化的回应，并为该方向的进一步研究提供了启示。

summary: Test-time scaling improves language-model reasoning, but existing approaches often face a difficult trade-off: long chain-of-thought sampling remains single-threaded, while sentence- or solution-level search can be computationally expensive and hard to train end-to-end. We introduce Local Branch Routing (LBR), a token-level test-time scaling framework that expands a small local lookahead tree, forwards all sampled branches through the language model, and uses a lightweight router to select the depth-1 subtree to commit. By routing over the hidden states of candidate local futures, LBR allows each token decision to use evidence beyond the root next-token distribution while avoiding full solution-level search. The resulting prune-shift-grow decoding process preserves discrete branch identities and defines a tractable tree-trajectory likelihood: newly grown nodes are counted when first sampled, and router decisions are assigned explicit probabilities. This enables end-to-end reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards, jointly optimizing the base model and router under the same likelihood-ratio principle as discrete-token RLVR. On synthetic hierarchical-planning tasks, LBR shows that post-candidate hidden states provide useful routing evidence. On mathematical reasoning benchmarks, LBR improves both Pass@1 and Pass@32 over discrete chain-of-thought, vanilla discrete-token RLVR, and RL-compatible soft-token branching baselines. These results suggest that lightweight local branching offers an efficient, trainable, and discrete form of language-model test-time scaling.
title: Efficient and Trainable Language Model Test-Time Scaling via Local Branch Routing
title_translated: 通过局部分支路由实现高效可训练的语言模型测试时缩放
summary_translated: 测试时缩放能够提升语言模型的推理能力，但现有方法常面临困难权衡：长链式思维采样仍为单线程，而句子或解级搜索则计算成本高且难以端到端训练。我们提出局部分支路由（LBR），一种基于token级别的测试时缩放框架，通过扩展一个小的局部前瞻树，将所有采样分支前向传播至语言模型，并使用轻量级路由器选择深度为1的子树进行提交。通过在候选局部未来状态的隐藏层上进行路由，LBR使每个token决策能利用根节点下一词分布之外的信息，同时避免全解级搜索。由此产生的剪枝-转移-生长解码过程保持了离散分支身份，并定义了可计算的树轨迹似然：新生成节点在首次采样时即被计数，路由器决策被赋予显式概率。这使得端到端强化学习成为可能，奖励可验证，且在相同的离散token RLVR似然比率原则下联合优化基础模型与路由器。在合成层次规划任务中，LBR表明后候选隐藏状态提供了有效的路由证据。在数学推理基准测试中，LBR在Pass@1和Pass@32上均优于离散链式思维、原始离散token RLVR及RL兼容软token分支基线。结果表明，轻量级局部分支提供了一种高效、可训练且离散的语言模型测试时缩放形式。

summary: Large language models (LLMs) have shown promising performance across a wide range of biomedical applications, including medical question answering (QA), yet they remain prone to hallucinations and outdated knowledge. Although retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) can alleviate this issue by incorporating external documents, there still exist two fundamental limitations. First, medical knowledge is often fragmented across documents, while most RAG methods rely on a single retrieval path, which makes it challenging to jointly preserve fine-grained semantic information and structured global associations. Second, static retrieval strategies are typically insufficient to support deep reasoning that is important in complex medical QA. In this paper, we present a dual-path retrieval framework with an iterative retrieval-reasoning mechanism termed "Hybrid-IR" for complex medical QA. The proposed Hybrid-IR integrates graph-based retrieval for exploration of structured knowledge and dense retrieval for fine-grained semantic matching. Moreover, the reasoning trajectory can be progressively refined through an iterative retrieve-reason loop. Experiments on three widely used medical QA benchmarks demonstrate the effectiveness of our Hybrid-IR.
title: Hybrid-IR: Dual-Path Hybrid Retrieval with Iterative Reasoning for Complex Medical Question Answering
title_translated: 混合检索：用于复杂医学问答的双路径混合检索与迭代推理
summary_translated: 大型语言模型（LLMs）在广泛的生物医学应用中表现出色，包括医学问答（QA），但仍易产生幻觉和依赖过时知识。尽管检索增强生成（RAG）可通过引入外部文档缓解此问题，但仍有两大根本局限。首先，医学知识常分散于多个文档中，而多数RAG方法依赖单一检索路径，难以同时保留细粒度语义信息与结构化全局关联。其次，静态检索策略通常不足以支持复杂医学QA中至关重要的深层推理。本文提出一种双路径检索框架，结合迭代检索-推理机制，命名为“Hybrid-IR”，用于复杂医学问答。所提出的Hybrid-IR融合基于图的检索以探索结构化知识，以及密集检索以实现细粒度语义匹配。此外，通过迭代检索-推理循环，推理轨迹可逐步优化。在三个广泛使用的医学QA基准上的实验验证了Hybrid-IR的有效性。

summary: Modern large language models are predominantly trained with autoregressive factorization and causal attention. We present \emph{iLLaDA}, an 8B masked diffusion language model trained from scratch with fully bidirectional attention. iLLaDA keeps the masked diffusion objective throughout pre-training and supervised fine-tuning (SFT), scaling pre-training to 12T tokens and fine-tuning on a 25B-token instruction corpus for 12 epochs. We further use variable-length generation for efficiency and introduce confidence-based scoring for multiple-choice evaluation. Compared with LLaDA, iLLaDA improves broadly across general, mathematical, and code benchmarks; for example, iLLaDA-Base improves by 21.6 points on BBH and 14.9 points on ARC-Challenge, while iLLaDA-Instruct improves by 14.5 points on MATH and 16.5 points on HumanEval. Despite its non-autoregressive training, iLLaDA also remains competitive with Qwen2.5 7B on several benchmarks. These results show that fully bidirectional diffusion training from scratch is a competitive path toward strong language models. Model weights and codes: https://github.com/ML-GSAI/LLaDA.
title: Improved Large Language Diffusion Models
title_translated: 改进的大语言扩散模型
summary_translated: 现代大语言模型主要采用自回归因子分解和因果注意力进行训练。我们提出了iLLaDA，一个从零开始训练的80亿参数掩码扩散语言模型，使用全双向注意力。iLLaDA在整个预训练和监督微调（SFT）过程中保持掩码扩散目标，将预训练规模扩展至12万亿个标记，并在包含250亿个标记的指令语料库上进行12轮微调。我们进一步采用变长生成以提高效率，并引入基于置信度的评分方法用于多选题评估。与LLaDA相比，iLLaDA在通用、数学和代码基准测试中均有显著提升；例如，iLLaDA-Base在BBH上提升了21.6分，在ARC-Challenge上提升了14.9分；iLLaDA-Instruct在MATH上提升了14.5分，在HumanEval上提升了16.5分。尽管采用非自回归训练方式，iLLaDA在多个基准测试中仍与Qwen2.5 7B具有竞争力。这些结果表明，从零开始的全双向扩散训练是构建强大语言模型的一种有竞争力路径。模型权重和代码：https://github.com/ML-GSAI/LLaDA。

summary: Highlights provide a concise summary of the main contributions of an academic paper and help readers quickly understand its focus. However, many journals do not provide highlights, which limits their use in literature retrieval, text mining, and bibliometric analysis. Existing studies have explored supervised learning methods for automatic highlight extraction, but these methods usually require large amounts of labeled training data. This study investigates prompt-based learning for automatic highlight generation. We design task-specific prompt templates and combine them with paper abstracts as model inputs. Several language models are evaluated, including locally deployed pre-trained models such as GPT-2 and T5, as well as ChatGPT accessed through an API. Experiments on three datasets show that ChatGPT with prompt templates achieves performance comparable to previous supervised methods without using task-specific training samples. When a small number of examples are added to the prompts, the model significantly outperforms state-of-the-art methods on two datasets. We further analyze how prompt design affects generation quality and find that, although ChatGPT has strong language modeling ability, its performance on this task is highly sensitive to the information provided in the prompt. Case studies also show that the generated highlights are generally coherent, informative, and close to author-written highlights. This study is among the first to apply prompt-based learning to academic highlight generation. The proposed method does not rely on domain-specific training corpora and can generate highlights for papers that lack such information, thereby supporting downstream text mining and bibliometric research.
title: Automatic Generation of Highlights for Academic Paper Via Prompt-based Learning
title_translated: 基于提示学习的学术论文亮点自动生成
summary_translated: 亮点为学术论文的主要贡献提供了简洁摘要，有助于读者快速理解其重点。然而，许多期刊并未提供亮点，限制了其在文献检索、文本挖掘和文献计量分析中的应用。现有研究探索了监督学习方法用于自动提取亮点，但这些方法通常需要大量标注训练数据。本研究探讨了基于提示学习的自动亮点生成方法。我们设计了特定任务的提示模板，并将其与论文摘要结合作为模型输入。评估了多种语言模型，包括本地部署的预训练模型如GPT-2和T5，以及通过API访问的ChatGPT。在三个数据集上的实验表明，使用提示模板的ChatGPT在无需特定任务训练样本的情况下，性能可媲美以往的监督方法。当在提示中加入少量示例时，该模型在两个数据集上的表现显著优于当前最先进方法。我们进一步分析了提示设计对生成质量的影响，发现尽管ChatGPT具备强大的语言建模能力，但其在此任务上的表现高度依赖于提示中提供的信息。案例研究也显示，生成的亮点通常连贯、信息丰富，且接近作者撰写的内容。本研究是首次将基于提示学习应用于学术亮点生成。所提出的方法不依赖领域特定训练语料，可为缺乏此类信息的论文生成亮点，从而支持下游文本挖掘和文献计量研究。

summary: Dictionaries are rich sources of lexical information about words that is required for many applications of natural language processing and human language technology. However, publishers prepare printed dictionaries for human usage not for machine processing. This paper presented a method to structure partly a machine-readable version of the Arabic-English Al-Mawrid dictionary. The method converted the entries of Al-Mawrid from a stream of words and punctuation marks into hierarchical structures. The hierarchical structure expresses the components of each dictionary entry in explicit format. A dictionary entry is composed of subentries and each subentry consists of defining phrases, domain labels, cross-references, and translation equivalences. We designed the proposed method as cascaded steps where parsing is the main step. We implemented the parser using the parsing expression grammars formalism. In conclusion, although Arabic dictionaries do not have microstructure standardization, this study demonstrated that it is possible to structure them automatically or semi-automatically with plausible accuracy after inducing their microstructure.
title: Towards Structuring an Arabic-English Machine-Readable Dictionary Using Parsing Expression Grammars
comment: 14 pages, 6 figures, 7 tables. The final publication is available at this https URL . Published in International Journal of Computational Linguistics Research (IJCLR), DLINE, March 2014, Vol 5, Issue 1, pp 1-13
title_translated: 利用解析表达式语法构建阿拉伯语-英语可机器读取词典的探索
summary_translated: 词典是自然语言处理和人类语言技术诸多应用所需词汇信息的重要来源。然而，出版商编纂印刷词典主要是为了供人类使用，而非机器处理。本文提出一种方法，用于部分结构化阿拉伯语-英语Al-Mawrid词典的机器可读版本。该方法将Al-Mawrid词条从一串单词和标点符号转换为层次化结构。层次结构以显式格式表达了每个词条的组成部分。一个词条由子词条构成，每个子词条包含定义短语、领域标签、交叉引用和翻译等价项。我们设计该方法为一系列级联步骤，其中解析是核心步骤。我们使用解析表达式语法形式化实现了解析器。结论表明，尽管阿拉伯语词典缺乏微观结构标准化，但本研究证明了在推导其微观结构后，可通过自动或半自动方式实现高精度的结构化。

summary: Jailbreak attacks reveal a persistent weakness in aligned Large Language Models: carefully crafted prompts can elicit policy-violating responses despite safety training. While most defenses operate at the prompt or output level, it remains unclear how harmful intent is encoded within the model's internal representations. We investigate this question by analyzing token-level predictive entropy trajectories across layers of a frozen LLM using the logit lens. We find that static aggregate statistics of prompt-level entropy (e.g., mean, variance) carry little discriminative signal, whereas features capturing how entropy evolves across token positions, such as monotonic rank-based trend scores, are substantially more informative. Importantly, this signal is not uniform across model depth: it is concentrated in intermediate layers and degrades at the final layer, indicating that jailbreak-relevant structure is most pronounced in mid-network representations rather than at the output head. Across multiple models (Llama, Qwen, Gemma) and adversarial benchmarks, these entropy dynamics provide architecture-consistent separation without additional training. Together, our findings show that jailbreak behavior is reflected in structured intermediate uncertainty dynamics, clarifying both which entropy-derived features encode harmful intent and where in the network that signal is most pronounced.
title: What Intermediate Layers Know: Detecting Jailbreaks from Entropy Dynamics
comment: Accepted at the European Conference on Machine Learning and Principles and Practice of Knowledge Discovery in Databases (ECML PKDD) 2026. A short version accepted at EIML@ICML 2026
title_translated: 中间层所知为何：从熵动态检测越狱攻击
summary_translated: 越狱攻击暴露了对齐大语言模型的一个持续性弱点：精心设计的提示即使在经过安全训练后，仍可能诱导出违反政策的响应。虽然大多数防御机制作用于提示或输出层面，但有害意图如何编码于模型内部表示仍不明确。我们通过使用logit lens分析冻结大语言模型各层的token级预测熵轨迹来探究这一问题。我们发现，提示级别的熵静态聚合统计量（如均值、方差）携带的信息量极少，而捕捉熵随token位置演变特征的指标（如基于单调排名的趋势分数）则具有更强的判别力。重要的是，这种信号并非在模型深度上均匀分布：它集中在中间层，而在最终层退化，表明越狱相关结构最明显体现在网络中间表示中，而非输出头。在多个模型（Llama、Qwen、Gemma）和对抗性基准测试中，这些熵动态提供了无需额外训练的架构一致分离。综上所述，我们的发现表明越狱行为反映在结构化的中间不确定性动态中，明确了哪些熵衍生特征编码了有害意图，以及该信号在网络中的何处最为显著。

summary: Deployed approaches for AI text detection often rely on training-time access to labeled datasets of both human-written and AI-generated text. This approach is vulnerable to three types of distribution shifts that occur continually post-deployment, and for which labeled data is often unavailable: adversarial humanization, new LLMs being released, and temporal drift in human writing. Simultaneously, existing approaches do not leverage a key signal of LLM usage: inference-time homogeneity. We propose a test-time adaptation (TTA) approach, using semi-supervised learning, that adapts to distribution shifts by leveraging homogeneity among unlabeled samples observed at inference time. Empirically, we find that state-of-the-art supervised detectors systematically fail when they encounter distribution shifts in AI-generated and human writing, both adversarial and natural, while test-time adaptation with semi-supervised learning is largely robust; e.g., the commercial model Pangram detects just 24.1% of our adversarial AI-generated text, compared to 90.5% for our test-time approach. We establish that test-time adaptation is a promising framework for AI text detection in the wild. We publicly release our code (which includes code for model training, evaluation, and plots) at https://github.com/kkr36/llm_detection.
title: Hitting a Moving Target: Test-Time Adaptation for AI Text Detection under Continual Distribution Shift
title_translated: 击中移动目标：面向持续分布偏移下AI文本检测的测试时适应
summary_translated: 已部署的AI文本检测方法通常依赖于训练阶段的人类写作和AI生成文本的标注数据集。这种方法容易受到三种持续发生的分布偏移影响，且在部署后往往缺乏标注数据：对抗性人类化、新大语言模型发布以及人类写作风格的时间漂移。同时，现有方法未充分利用一个关键信号——大语言模型使用的推理时同质性。我们提出一种测试时适应（TTA）方法，采用半监督学习，通过利用推理时观察到的无标签样本之间的同质性来适应分布偏移。实证研究表明，最先进的监督检测器在遇到AI生成文本和人类写作的分布偏移（无论是对抗性还是自然的）时系统性失效，而采用半监督学习的测试时适应方法则表现出较强的鲁棒性；例如，商业模型Pangram仅能检测出我们对抗性AI生成文本的24.1%，而我们的测试时方法可达到90.5%。我们确立了测试时适应是真实世界中AI文本检测的一个有前景框架。我们已在https://github.com/kkr36/llm_detection公开发布代码（包含模型训练、评估和绘图代码）。

summary: Objectives: To develop a codebook for self-stigma across cognitive, affective, and behavioral domains, and to estimate the prevalence, co-occurrence, and temporal patterns of these indicators in Reddit posts by people who use drugs. Methods: We developed a ten-indicator codebook through consensus-based abductive coding spanning cognitive (self-labeling, pessimism/self-defeatism, deservingness/worthlessness), affective (shame, guilt/self-blame, despair/hopelessness), and behavioral (concealment, anticipated rejection, desire to quit, ambivalence) domains; two coders reached substantial agreement (Cohen's k = 0.72). We then scaled classification with a large language model validated against expert coding (k = 0.73, F1 = 0.80), analyzing 72,115 thread-initiating posts from 1,660 English-language users (2006-2025). Results: 3,838 posts (5.3%) from 1,228 users (74.0%) contained self-stigma; all ten indicators discriminated self-stigma posts (RR 3.6 to 86.2), led by self-labeling (56.0%) and despair/hopelessness (48.5%). Self-stigma was integrated: core and behavioral indicators were strongly associated at the user level (OR = 4.65, 95% CI 3.12-6.94, p < 0.001), and 87.0% of posts with behavioral indicators also contained a core indicator. Contrary to progressive models, behavioral indicators emerged earlier than core ones (desire to quit at median position 0.08 vs. shame at 0.38). Nine of ten indicators were stable across posting trajectories; only pessimism increased (OR = 1.62, 95% CI 1.25-2.10). Conclusion: Among people who use drugs online, self-stigma is an integrated phenomenon in which behavioral indicators rarely appear without internalized ones and often precede them. Most expressions remain stable over time, but pessimism about change deepens, marking a target for early digital intervention and showing that progressive stage models do not map directly onto textual disclosure.
title: The cognitive, affective, and behavioral expression of self-stigma among people who use drugs in online substance use communities
title_translated: 在线药物使用社区中吸毒人群自我污名的认知、情感与行为表现
summary_translated: 目的：开发一个涵盖认知、情感和行为领域的自我污名编码手册，并估算Reddit帖子中这些指标的流行率、共现情况及时间模式。方法：通过共识驱动的归纳编码，构建了包含十个指标的编码手册，涵盖认知（自我标签化、悲观/自我挫败、应得性/无价值感）、情感（羞耻、内疚/自责、绝望/无望）和行为（隐瞒、预期排斥、戒断意愿、矛盾心理）领域；两名编码者达成良好一致性（Cohen's k = 0.72）。随后采用经专家编码验证的大语言模型进行规模化分类（k = 0.73，F1 = 0.80），分析了1,660名英语用户在2006-2025年间发布的72,115条主题帖。结果：共3,838篇帖子（5.3%）来自1,228名用户（74.0%）包含自我污名；所有十项指标均能有效区分自我污名帖子（相对风险RR 3.6至86.2），其中自我标签化（56.0%）和绝望/无望（48.5%）最为突出。自我污名具有整合性：核心指标与行为指标在用户层面高度相关（OR = 4.65，95% CI 3.12-6.94，p < 0.001），且87.0%的行为指标帖子同时包含核心指标。与渐进模型相反，行为指标出现早于核心指标（戒断意愿中位位置为0.08，羞耻为0.38）。除悲观情绪外，其余九项指标在发布轨迹中保持稳定；仅悲观情绪随时间增强（OR = 1.62，95% CI 1.25-2.10）。结论：在线吸毒人群中，自我污名是一种整合现象，行为表现极少独立出现，常先于内在认同出现。大多数表达在时间上保持稳定，但对改变的悲观情绪加深，提示早期数字干预的靶点，并表明渐进阶段模型无法直接映射文本披露过程。

summary: Large language models have transformed code generation, raising concerns around authorship, assessment integrity, and software trust. SemEval-2026 Task 13 Subtask A operationalizes detection as binary classification over code snippets, with a particular emphasis on out-of-distribution (OOD) generalization across unseen programming languages and application domains. We propose a SALSA-style formulation, Single-pass Autoregressive LLM Structured Classification, that maps each class to a dedicated output token and trains the model to emit a single-token label in a structured response. Rather than engineering hand-crafted features or decision rules, this formulation delegates the authorship decision to the model. To improve OOD robustness, we combine balanced sampling across languages with parameter-efficient fine-tuning and conservative training (low learning rate, single epoch) to avoid overfitting to the training domain. Our best system achieves OOD $F_1 = 0.789$ on the official leaderboard, substantially outperforming the CodeBERT baseline ($F_1 = 0.305$).
title: Dream at SemEval-2026 Task 13: SALSA for Single-Pass Machine-Generated Code Detection
comment: Accepted to SemEval-2026, ACL 2026 workshop proceedings
title_translated: Dream在SemEval-2026任务13中的表现：用于单次通过机器生成代码检测的SALSA方法
summary_translated: 大语言模型已彻底改变代码生成，引发关于作者身份、评估完整性及软件可信度的担忧。SemEval-2026任务13子任务A将检测问题定义为对代码片段的二分类任务，特别强调在未见过的编程语言和应用领域上的分布外（OOD）泛化能力。我们提出一种SALSA风格的框架——单次通过自回归大语言模型结构化分类，将每个类别映射到一个专用输出标记，并训练模型以结构化响应形式输出单一标记。该方法不依赖手工特征或决策规则，而是将作者身份判断交由模型自主完成。为提升OOD鲁棒性，我们结合跨语言的平衡采样、参数高效微调以及保守训练策略（低学习率、单轮训练），避免对训练域过拟合。我们的最佳系统在官方排行榜上实现OOD F1值为0.789，显著优于CodeBERT基线（F1 = 0.305）。

summary: The rapid growth of scientific submissions has pushed traditional peer review toward its scalability limits, motivating the exploration of large language models (LLMs) as intelligent automated evaluation assistants. Although recent studies show that LLMs can generate fluent critiques and approximate reviewer scores, their reliability, robustness, and security as decision-support systems remain insufficiently understood. This survey offers a systems-level analysis of LLM-based scientific peer review, focusing on two core evaluative functions: critique generation and score prediction. We present a structured taxonomy of modeling approaches (including prompt-based, supervised, retrieval-augmented, and alignment-optimized approaches), and synthesize empirical findings across existing benchmarks. We analyze dataset constraints, evaluation shortcomings, and domain concentration biases that limit current assessment practices. Beyond performance metrics, we identify emerging robustness risks, including prompt injection, data poisoning, retrieval vulnerabilities, and reward hacking, which expose automated review pipelines to strategic manipulation. From a data mining perspective, we outline key open challenges in modeling subjective disagreement and cross-domain generalization. By reframing automated peer review as a high-stakes, multi-objective decision problem, this survey provides a roadmap for developing robust, transparent, and trustworthy AI-assisted scientific evaluation systems.
title: LLM-Based Scientific Peer Review: Methods, Benchmarks, and Reliability Challenges
title_translated: 基于大语言模型的科学同行评审：方法、基准与可靠性挑战
summary_translated: 科学投稿量的快速增长已使传统同行评审逼近可扩展性极限，推动了将大语言模型（LLMs）作为智能自动化评估助手的探索。尽管近期研究显示LLMs能够生成流畅的批评意见并近似评审评分，但其作为决策支持系统的可靠性、鲁棒性和安全性仍缺乏充分理解。本综述从系统层面分析基于LLM的科学同行评审，聚焦两大核心评估功能：批评生成与评分预测。我们提出了建模方法的结构化分类（包括基于提示、监督式、检索增强及对齐优化等方法），并综合现有基准的实证发现。我们分析了数据集限制、评估缺陷及领域集中偏差对当前评估实践的制约。除了性能指标外，我们识别出新兴的鲁棒性风险，如提示注入、数据污染、检索漏洞和奖励劫持，这些暴露了自动化评审流程面临的战略性操纵威胁。从数据挖掘视角出发，我们指出了建模主观分歧与跨领域泛化的关键开放挑战。通过将自动化同行评审重新定义为高风险、多目标决策问题，本综述为构建稳健、透明且可信的AI辅助科学评估系统提供了路线图。

summary: We introduce a dataset of 32,534 double-marked real student responses to GCSE mock exams (GCSEs are the UK's national exams, taken at age ~16), spanning 328 questions across five subjects and including handwritten work. We test whether off-the-shelf large language models agree with examiners as closely as the two examiners agree with each other. We find that models overwhelmingly agree well with the examiner consensus across subjects, with the top performing models agreeing more closely with examiners than examiners agree with each other. Models achieve high scores for subjective tasks like English essay marking, as well as handling complex and messy handwritten Maths paper scripts. Agreement is uniform near the examiner line, and not massively discriminated by model size, providing cost-effective automated marking solutions.
title: LLM Performance on a Real, Double-Marked GCSE Benchmark
title_translated: 大语言模型在真实双评GCSE基准测试中的表现
summary_translated: 我们引入了一个包含32,534份真实学生在GCSE模拟考试中的双评答卷数据集（GCSE是英国16岁左右学生参加的全国性考试），涵盖五个学科共328个题目，包括手写内容。我们检验了现成的大语言模型是否能像两位考官之间的一致性那样，与考官共识保持高度一致。结果显示，模型在各科目中普遍与考官共识高度一致，表现最优的模型甚至比考官之间的互评一致性还要高。模型在英语作文等主观任务上得分优异，也能有效处理复杂且杂乱的手写数学试卷。一致性在考官评分线附近均匀分布，且不显著受模型规模影响，为低成本自动化评分提供了可行方案。

summary: While speculative decoding improves inference throughput for multi-batch long-context Large Language Models (LLMs), its efficiency is often limited by a verification bottleneck where Key-Value (KV) cache loading dominates latency. Existing compression methods fail in this regime: static eviction incurs accuracy loss due to saliency shift, while dynamic selection introduces prohibitive computational overhead during the verification path. We propose Dustin, a sparse verification framework designed for long-context speculative decoding. Dustin integrates lookahead signals from the draft model with historical attention from the target model to identify critical tokens with high fidelity across multi-step verification windows. To reduce recomputation latency, this approach further employs a sparse estimation scheme that restricts importance scoring to a minimal subset of attention heads. Evaluations on PG-19 and LongBench with Qwen2.5-72B demonstrate that Dustin achieves a 27.85x speedup in self-attention and a 9.17x end-to-end decoding speedup at a 32k sequence length, all with negligible accuracy degradation.
title: Dustin: Draft-Augmented Sparse Verification for Efficient Long-Context Generation with Speculative Decoding
comment: Accepted to ICML 2026. 9 pages main text, includes references and appendix
title_translated: Dustin：用于高效长上下文生成的草稿增强稀疏验证机制与推测解码
summary_translated: 虽然推测解码提升了多批次长上下文大语言模型（LLMs）的推理吞吐量，但其效率常受限于验证瓶颈——键值（KV）缓存加载主导延迟。现有压缩方法在此场景下失效：静态淘汰导致因显著性偏移而精度下降，动态选择则在验证路径引入过高的计算开销。我们提出Dustin，一种专为长上下文推测解码设计的稀疏验证框架。Dustin结合草稿模型的前瞻信号与目标模型的历史注意力，识别多步验证窗口中具有高保真度的关键token。为降低重计算延迟，该方法进一步采用稀疏估计策略，仅对最小注意力头子集进行重要性评分。在PG-19和LongBench数据集上使用Qwen2.5-72B的评估表明，Dustin在32k序列长度下实现了自注意力27.85倍加速和端到端解码9.17倍加速，且精度损失可忽略不计。

summary: A central aspiration of mechanistic interpretability is controllability: if we know where a behavior is represented in a model's activations, we should be able to modify it. This rests on a hidden premise -- that the direction which detects a behavior and the direction which controls it are the same, or close. We test this geometrically: what is the angle between the direction that best detects a behavior and the one that best causes it? If detection implies control the cosine is near 1; otherwise it quantifies a detection-intervention gap. On Gemma 2-2B-it, output format (clean JSON vs markdown fencing) collapses both roles onto one axis. Hallucination does not: the model detects fake entities with perfect linear separability (AUC = 1.000 from layer 5), yet that direction sits at cos = 0.12 (about 83 degrees) from the direction producing a refusal -- a small, reproducible alignment, far from the cos = 1 that "detection is control" would require. A detector built from activations, with no chosen tokens, likewise fails to align (cos = -0.06). The gap generalizes: across four models from three families and two scales (1B-9B), cos stays in [0.12, 0.20], identical before and after instruction tuning (0.1197 vs 0.1200), placing its origin in pretraining. A 15-degree rotation toward the refusal direction partially bridges it -- 73% and 60% refusal on two held-out fake-entity categories at 1.8% false positives. We then ask whether this cosine predicts steerability, and it does not: detection is a high-dimensional class, not a single direction, and what separates the steerable case is functional, not readable from a static angle. The cosine is a weight-computable signature of the dissociation between knowing and steering, not a predictor of it.
title: Perfect Detection, Failed Control: The Geometry of Knowing vs. Steering in Language Models
title_translated: 完美检测，控制失败：语言模型中知与控的几何关系
summary_translated: 机制可解释性的一个核心目标是可控性：如果我们知道某种行为在模型激活中的表示位置，就应该能够对其进行修改。这依赖于一个隐含前提——检测行为的方向与控制行为的方向相同或相近。我们从几何角度进行检验：最佳检测行为的方向与最佳引发行为的方向之间的夹角是多少？如果检测意味着控制，余弦值应接近1；否则，它量化了检测与干预之间的差距。在Gemma 2-2B-it模型中，输出格式（干净JSON vs Markdown封装）将这两个角色合并到同一轴上。然而，幻觉行为并非如此：模型对虚假实体具有完美的线性可分性（第5层AUC=1.000），但该方向与导致拒绝响应的方向之间的余弦值仅为0.12（约83度），这是一个小而可复现的对齐偏差，远未达到“检测即控制”所要求的cos=1。仅基于激活构建的探测器（不依赖选定词元）同样无法对齐（cos=-0.06）。这一差距具有泛化性：在来自三个模型家族、两个规模（1B-9B）的四个模型中，余弦值保持在[0.12, 0.20]之间，指令微调前后无显著差异（0.1197 vs 0.1200），表明其根源在于预训练阶段。将方向向拒绝方向旋转15度可部分弥合该差距——在两个独立的虚假实体类别上，错误率仅为1.8%时，拒绝率分别达到73%和60%。随后我们探讨该余弦值是否能预测可操控性，结果发现不能：检测是一个高维类别，而非单一方向，真正决定可操控性的因素是功能性的，而非静态角度所能读取。余弦值是知识与操控分离的权重可计算标志，而非其预测因子。

summary: End-to-end automatic speech recognition systems frequently hallucinate rare entities and domain-specific terms, especially in low-resource languages. While retrieval-augmented generation frameworks can mitigate these errors using large language models, current architectures face significant challenges. They either rely on standard sparse retrieval that ignores phonetic misrecognitions or utilize heavyweight cross-modal embeddings that introduce high latency. This letter proposes a highly efficient, purely lexical error-aware framework designed to explicitly resolve phonetic and loop hallucinations. Our approach integrates a symmetric text normalization module with a novel error-aware term frequency-inverse document frequency algorithm. By constructing a sparse diagonal penalty matrix based on historical errors, the retriever mathematically prioritizes corrective documents containing specific high-risk misrecognitions. Evaluated on the Persian subset of the FLEURS dataset, our method increased the error-aware hit rate from 53.7% to 90.9%. In end-to-end evaluations, the integrated framework reduced the final word error rate from 23.06% to 18.83%, achieving significant accuracy gains with near-zero inference latency.
title: Error-Aware TF-IDF Retrieval-Augmented Generation for ASR Error Correction
title_translated: 面向语音识别错误纠正的误差感知TF-IDF检索增强生成
summary_translated: 端到端自动语音识别系统在低资源语言中经常误识罕见实体和领域特定术语。尽管检索增强生成框架可通过大语言模型缓解这些错误，但现有架构面临重大挑战：要么依赖忽略语音误识的标准稀疏检索，要么使用引入高延迟的重型跨模态嵌入。本文提出一种高度高效、纯词汇化的误差感知框架，旨在显式解决语音和循环性幻觉问题。我们的方法结合对称文本归一化模块与一种新颖的误差感知词频-逆文档频率算法。通过基于历史错误构建稀疏对角惩罚矩阵，检索器在数学上优先选择包含特定高风险误识的修正文档。在FLEURS数据集的波斯语子集上评估，该方法将误差感知命中率从53.7%提升至90.9%。在端到端评估中，集成框架将最终词错误率从23.06%降低至18.83%，在近乎零推理延迟下实现显著精度提升。

summary: For agents to learn continuously from interaction with the world at test time, they must be able to explore effectively, acquire new world knowledge and skills, retain relevant episodic experiences, and plan over long horizons. To evaluate these key abilities of test-time continual learning agents, we introduce AgentOdyssey, a novel evaluation framework that procedurally generates open-ended text games with rich entities, world dynamics, and long-horizon tasks. Critically, AgentOdyssey goes beyond the conventional machine learning assumption that learning does not occur at test time by placing agents in a continuous, long-horizon setting that interleaves learning and inference throughout deployment. We further propose a multifaceted evaluation methodology that measures not only game progress but also offers diagnostic tests on world knowledge acquisition, episodic memory, object and action exploration, action diversity, and model cost. We evaluate diverse agent paradigms in the generated games. Our experimental results reveal critical limits in agents' key abilities, as well as factors that influence their meaningful horizon. Although performance scales with stronger base models, even the top agent remains far below human performance, leaving substantial headroom for improvement. Among agent mechanisms, we find that short-term memory benefits multiple agent paradigms and is an important component of agent test-time training.
title: AgentOdyssey: Open-Ended Long-Horizon Text Game Generation for Test-Time Continual Learning Agents
title_translated: AgentOdyssey：用于测试时持续学习智能体的开放式长周期文本游戏生成
summary_translated: 为了让智能体在测试时持续从与世界交互中学习，它们必须具备有效探索、获取新世界知识与技能、保留相关情景经验以及进行长期规划的能力。为评估测试时持续学习智能体的这些关键能力，我们提出了AgentOdyssey，一个新颖的评估框架，可程序化生成具有丰富实体、世界动态和长周期任务的开放式文本游戏。关键在于，AgentOdyssey突破了传统机器学习中‘学习不在测试时发生’的假设，将智能体置于一个连续的、长周期环境中，在部署过程中交织进行学习与推理。我们进一步提出多维度评估方法，不仅衡量游戏进展，还提供关于世界知识获取、情景记忆、对象与动作探索、动作多样性及模型成本的诊断测试。我们在生成的游戏环境中评估了多种智能体范式。实验结果揭示了智能体在关键能力上的严重局限性，以及影响其有效学习周期的因素。尽管性能随更强的基础模型而提升，但即使是最优智能体仍远低于人类表现，显示出巨大的改进空间。在智能体机制方面，我们发现短期记忆对多种智能体范式均有益处，是测试时训练的重要组成部分。

summary: Can a small group of volunteers shape how AI systems discuss animal welfare, just by editing Wikipedia? We show that they can. Wikipedia appears in nearly every major language model training dataset and is weighted more heavily than web-crawled text. The Pro-Animal Wikipedians (PAW), a group of advocates who add sourced animal welfare content to relevant articles, have made 125 edits across 115 pages. Using gradient-based data attribution (Bergson; MAGIC), we traced how these edits influence language model behavior. TrackStar retrieval attribution on Llama 3.1 8B found that PAW-edited sections made up 68 percent of the highest-attributed documents for animal welfare queries (p < 0.0001) but only 52 percent for unrelated queries about the same companies (p = 0.53): the model links PAW content specifically to animal welfare topics, not to the entities in general. MAGIC counterfactual influence estimation on Llama-3.2-1B, run across five random training-order seeds, gave the same picture even more sharply: in every seed, the top-10 most influential documents on animal welfare queries were all PAW edits (10 of 10, 5 of 5 seeds), while on general queries the same top-10 sat at chance (4 to 6 of 10). Mean PAW influence exceeded mean control influence on animal welfare queries with p < 0.0001 in every seed, an effect 6 to 30 times larger than on general queries. Leave-subset-out validation gave Spearman rho = 1.00 for all 10 runs. When we fine-tuned separate models on PAW content versus control content, each model performed better specifically on the type of text it was trained on: the PAW-trained model cut perplexity on animal welfare text from 12.4 to 8.4, while the control-trained model cut perplexity on control text from 16.1 to 11.4. A small, coordinated Wikipedia editing campaign therefore measurably shapes how language models handle the topics those edits address.
title: Small edits, large models: How Wikipedia advocacy shapes LLM values
title_translated: 小改动，大模型：维基百科倡导如何塑造大语言模型的价值观
summary_translated: 一小群志愿者仅通过编辑维基百科，就能影响AI系统对动物福利的讨论吗？我们证明他们可以。维基百科几乎出现在每个主流语言模型的训练数据集中，并且权重高于网络爬取文本。主张动物福利的维基编辑者（PAW）群体，通过添加有来源的动物福利内容，已在115个页面上进行了125次编辑。我们利用基于梯度的数据归因方法（Bergson；MAGIC），追踪这些编辑如何影响语言模型的行为。在Llama 3.1 8B上运行TrackStar检索归因发现，PAW编辑部分占动物福利查询最高归因文档的68%（p < 0.0001），但在关于同一家公司的无关查询中仅占52%（p = 0.53）：模型仅将PAW内容与动物福利主题关联，而非一般实体。在Llama-3.2-1B上进行的MAGIC反事实影响估计，覆盖五个随机训练顺序种子，结果更加清晰：在每个种子中，动物福利查询的前10个最具影响力文档均为PAW编辑（10/10，5/5种子），而在一般查询中则处于随机水平（4–6/10）。在每个种子中，PAW的影响均显著超过控制组影响（p < 0.0001），效应强度是普通查询的6至30倍。移除子集验证显示所有10次运行的Spearman等级相关系数均为1.00。当我们分别在PAW内容与控制内容上微调模型时，每种模型在对应类型文本上表现更优：PAW训练模型将动物福利文本困惑度从12.4降至8.4，而控制训练模型将控制文本困惑度从16.1降至11.4。因此，一次小规模、协调一致的维基百科编辑活动确实显著塑造了语言模型处理相关话题的方式。

summary: Automatic speech recognition (ASR) systems, despite low overall word error rates, produce residual lexical errors that disproportionately affect semantically critical tokens such as named entities, negations, and sentiment-bearing words. These errors are often structured, arising from phonetic similarity rather than random noise, making naive token-level correction insufficient. We propose a structured ASR correction framework, that we call G-SPIN, that combines phonetic graph modeling with contextual language understanding. A graph neural network (GNN) first constructs acoustically plausible candidate neighborhoods for flagged tokens, explicitly restricting the correction search space to phonetic alternatives. A masked language model (MLM) then provides local contextual scoring, and an instruction-tuned large language model (LLM) performs final context-aware re-ranking over this compact candidate set. By decoupling structured phonetic reasoning from contextual semantic selection, our method avoids unconstrained generation while improving correction accuracy. The framework is lightweight, modular, and operates entirely at inference time.
title: Graph-Based Phonetic Error Correction of Noisy ASR
title_translated: 基于图的语音识别噪声错误纠正
summary_translated: 尽管自动语音识别（ASR）系统的整体词错误率较低，但仍会产生残余的词汇错误，这些错误往往集中在语义关键词上，如命名实体、否定词和情感承载词。这些错误通常具有结构性，源于语音相似性而非随机噪声，使得简单的词元级纠正无效。我们提出一种结构化的ASR纠错框架，称为G-SPIN，结合语音图建模与上下文语言理解。首先，图神经网络（GNN）为标记的词元构建声学上合理的候选邻域，明确将纠错搜索空间限制在语音替代项内。接着，掩码语言模型（MLM）提供局部上下文评分，最后由指令微调的大语言模型（LLM）对这一紧凑候选集进行最终的上下文感知重排序。通过将结构化的语音推理与上下文语义选择解耦，我们的方法避免了不受约束的生成，同时提升了纠正准确性。该框架轻量、模块化，完全在推理时运行。

summary: Midway through an ordinary pretraining run, a small language model learns the pronoun-gender rule: cued with a girl's name ("Sue cried because"), it resolves the next pronoun to she, generalizing to held-out probes (0.94 by step 925). By step 3,500 the same model scores near zero on the same probes, although the rule's evidence is still in the training data. We call this within-run reversal natural ungrokking: the corpus decides, with no trace in the loss curve, which learned rules a model keeps.   Which rules survive is predictable from one corpus statistic: how often the training stream shows the rule winning. Across un-intervened runs (two corpora, three budgets, three seeds), support frequency decides a rule's fate; the data-to-parameter ratio only modulates how deeply a doomed rule falls. The same emerge-then-collapse dynamics appear in public Pythia checkpoints, collapse depth ordered by model scale as predicted. The forgetting is a displacement: a competing surface pattern out-competes the rule, and the log-probability margin between them crosses zero within 100 training steps of the behavioral collapse.   Control over this fate is asymmetric: the same edit that destroys a rule on demand cannot restore it. Flipping support to counter-evidence in place kills the rule with monotone dose-response in two unrelated rules; but injecting support back, even to 450 times the level that naturally sustains it, buys no recovery. Every confirmatory threshold and prediction was pre-registered before the data it governed was read.
title: Natural Ungrokking: Asymmetric Control of Which Rules Survive Pretraining
comment: Foundations of Deep Generative Models (FoGen) Workshop at ICML 2026. 23 pages (5-page main text plus appendices), 5 figures. Code: this https URL
title_translated: 自然解构：预训练过程中规则存活的非对称控制
summary_translated: 在一次普通的预训练过程中，一个小语言模型学会了代词-性别规则：当以女孩名字（如“Sue cried because”）为提示时，它会将下一个代词解析为“she”，并在未见探测样本上实现0.94的准确率（第925步）。然而到第3,500步时，同一模型在同一探测任务上的得分接近零，尽管该规则的证据仍存在于训练数据中。我们称这种运行期内的反转现象为‘自然解构’：语料库在没有损失曲线痕迹的情况下决定了模型保留哪些学习规则。规则能否存活可由一个语料库统计量预测：训练流中规则获胜的频率。在多个未干预的运行实验中（两个语料库、三个预算、三个随机种子），支持频率决定了规则的命运；数据-参数比仅调节 doomed 规则衰落的深度。类似的先出现后崩溃动态也出现在公开的 Pythia 检查点中，崩溃深度与模型规模的预测一致。遗忘是一种取代：一个竞争性的表面模式击败了原规则，两者之间的对数概率差在行为崩溃后的100个训练步骤内跨过零点。对这一命运的控制是非对称的：能够按需破坏规则的修改，无法恢复它。在不相关规则中，将支持翻转为反证据能以单调剂量响应的方式彻底消灭规则；但即使重新注入支持，达到自然维持水平的450倍，也无法实现恢复。所有确认阈值和预测均在读取所依赖数据前预先注册。

summary: Vision-language models (VLMs) have achieved strong performance on OCR-based benchmarks and increasingly focused on text-rich understanding, but their robustness under controlled visual degradation remains insufficiently understood. This gap is critical for OCR reasoning, where visual corruption can induce OCR errors and structural distortions, thereby introducing uncertainty into the reasoning task. To systematically study this problem, we introduce OCR-Robust, a benchmark designed for evaluating OCR reasoning robustness under visual perturbations. It contains 812 samples across two complementary subsets: OCR1.0, covering documents, scene text, receipts, handwriting, and mathematical content, and OCR2.0, focusing on charts, geometry diagrams, and tables. To enable efficient yet informative evaluation, we conduct a pilot study over 18 candidate perturbations and select 5 representative types at 3 severity levels each based on their impact and cross-model discriminability. We evaluate robustness using clean accuracy, Relative Corruption Retention (RCR), Worst-Case Retention (WCR), and a composite Corruption Robustness Index (CRI), and benchmark 18 models spanning proprietary systems, open-source VLMs, and OCR+LLM pipelines. Our results show that higher clean accuracy does not necessarily imply stronger robustness, and that models can suffer pronounced degradation in the worst case on OCR tasks that are sensitive to structure, and charts and tables are substantially more fragile than document-like inputs under perturbation.
title: How Robust is OCR-Reasoning? Evaluating OCR-Reasoning Robustness of Vision-Language Models under Visual Perturbations
title_translated: OCR推理的鲁棒性有多强？在视觉扰动下评估视觉-语言模型的OCR推理鲁棒性
summary_translated: 视觉-语言模型（VLMs）在基于OCR的基准测试中取得了优异表现，并日益关注文本密集型理解任务，但其在受控视觉退化下的鲁棒性仍缺乏充分理解。这一差距对OCR推理至关重要，因为视觉污染可能引发OCR错误和结构扭曲，从而引入推理任务中的不确定性。为系统研究该问题，我们提出了OCR-Robust，一个用于评估视觉扰动下OCR推理鲁棒性的基准。该基准包含812个样本，分为两个互补子集：OCR1.0涵盖文档、场景文本、收据、手写体和数学内容；OCR2.0聚焦图表、几何图示和表格。为实现高效且信息丰富的评估，我们对18种候选扰动进行了初步研究，并基于其影响和跨模型区分能力，选取5种代表性类型，每种类型设置3个严重程度等级。我们使用干净准确率、相对扰动保留率（RCR）、最坏情况保留率（WCR）以及综合扰动鲁棒性指数（CRI）来评估鲁棒性，并对18种模型进行基准测试，涵盖专有系统、开源VLMs及OCR+LLM流水线。结果表明，更高的干净准确率并不意味着更强的鲁棒性，且在对结构敏感的任务中，模型在最坏情况下可能出现显著性能下降；图表和表格在扰动下比文档类输入脆弱得多。

summary: We introduce Autodata, a general method that enables AI agents to act as data scientists who build high quality training and evaluation data. We show how to train (meta-optimize) such a data scientist agent, so that it learns to create even stronger data. We describe the overall formulation, and a specific practical implementation, Agentic Self-Instruct. We conduct experiments on computer science research tasks, legal reasoning tasks and reasoning with mathematical objects, where we obtain improved results compared to classical synthetic dataset creation methods. Further, meta-optimizing the data scientist agent itself delivers an even larger performance uplift. Agentic data creation provides a way to convert increased inference compute into higher quality model training. Overall, we believe this direction has the potential to change the way we build AI data.
title: Autodata: An agentic data scientist to create high quality synthetic data
title_translated: Autodata：一个智能体数据科学家以生成高质量合成数据
summary_translated: 我们提出Autodata，一种通用方法，使AI智能体能够扮演数据科学家角色，构建高质量的训练与评估数据。我们展示了如何训练（元优化）此类数据科学家智能体，使其学会创建更强大的数据。我们描述了整体框架及一种具体实用实现——Agentic Self-Instruct。我们在计算机科学研究任务、法律推理任务和数学对象推理任务中进行实验，结果优于传统合成数据集生成方法。此外，对数据科学家智能体本身进行元优化带来了更大的性能提升。智能体驱动的数据生成为将增加的推理计算转化为更高品质的模型训练提供了新路径。总体而言，我们认为这一方向有潜力改变我们构建AI数据的方式。

summary: When a large language model (LLM) answers a question about a company, it grounds the answer in retrieved web sources, and those sources decide what the model says. Most analysis of AI brand visibility looks at the answer text. This study looks one step earlier, at the citations. We merge three Rankfor.AI datasets covering 128 brands across 12 home markets and 13 languages, and analyse 167,551 URL-grounded citations (189,974 total attribution rows). We classify each citation by domain and source type and measure where AI gets its brand information, by language and by market. Four patterns hold. First, AI grounds brand answers overwhelmingly in third-party sources: 85.7% of citations point to sites the brand does not own, against 14.3% owned. Second, the source base is concentrated and long-tailed: 80% of citations come from about 18% of domains, fitting a Zipf law (alpha = 0.86, R^2 = 0.983). Third, one reference site dominates almost everywhere: Wikipedia is the most-cited domain in 11 of 12 languages, the exception being Lithuanian, where the business daily vz.lt edges it (4.38%). Fourth, the source mix is market-specific at the margin: for 46 Polish national brands the most-cited domain is YouTube, and four HR and careers portals supply 637 citations against 297 for Polish Wikipedia, about twice as many.
title: How Large Language Models Source Brand Reputation Across Languages and Markets
comment: 12 pages, no figures, tables only. Data and analysis ledger on Zenodo, this https URL
title_translated: 大型语言模型如何跨语言和市场获取品牌声誉
summary_translated: 当大型语言模型（LLM）回答关于公司的提问时，其答案基于检索到的网络来源，而这些来源决定了模型说什么。大多数关于AI品牌可见性的分析仅关注答案文本。本研究则更进一步，考察引用来源。我们整合了三个Rankfor.AI数据集，覆盖128个品牌在12个母市场和13种语言中的信息，分析了167,551条URL支撑的引用（共189,974条归属行）。我们按领域和来源类型对每条引用进行分类，并测量AI在不同语言和市场中获取品牌信息的来源分布。发现四个规律：第一，AI几乎完全基于第三方来源构建品牌答案：85.7%的引用指向品牌不拥有的网站，仅14.3%属于品牌自有；第二，来源集中且呈长尾分布：约18%的域名贡献了80%的引用，符合Zipf定律（alpha = 0.86，R² = 0.983）；第三，单一参考站点几乎无处不在主导地位：Wikipedia在12种语言中的11种是最常被引用的域名，唯一例外是立陶宛，当地商业日报vz.lt略胜一筹（4.38%）；第四，来源构成在边际上具有市场特异性：对于46个波兰本土品牌，最常被引用的域名是YouTube，而四个人力资源与职业门户共提供637条引用，远超波兰维基百科的297条，约为其两倍。

summary: We initiate a resource-aware theory of \textit{language generation in the limit} under the minimal constraint of space efficiency. In our framework, a learner observes an adversarial positive stream from a target language $K$ and must eventually output a hallucination-free hypothesis language $L \subseteq K$ while omitting at most $Δ$ strings of $K$. We focus on $\mathcal{C}_{s,k}$, the collection of languages recognized by DFAs with at most $s$ states over an alphabet of size $k$, as the natural hypothesis class for memory-bounded learners. In the exponential-space regime, we prove that a learner can exactly identify the target $K$. Under a stricter memory budget, we characterize the strongest possible generation guarantees. In particular, we present a streaming algorithm using $\mathrm{poly}(s,k)$ space that converges to a hypothesis with generation gap $Δ= O(k^{2s-2})$. Moreover, the learned hypothesis captures every string in $K$ of length at least $2s-1$. We complement this result with a near-matching lower bound through a reduction from a standard communication complexity problem. Specifically, achieving generation gap $Δ\le k^{(1-\varepsilon)s}$ requires $k^{Ω(\varepsilon s)}$ memory. Together, these results reveal a sharp transition between polynomial-space generation and exponential-space exact identification.
title: Space-Efficient Language Generation in the Limit
title_translated: 极限状态下的空间高效语言生成
summary_translated:
我们启动了一项资源感知的理论研究，探讨在最小约束——空间效率下的‘极限语言生成’。在我们的框架中，学习者观察来自目标语言 $K$ 的对抗性正例流，必须最终输出一个无幻觉的假设语言 $L \ ackslashsubseteq K$，最多遗漏 $Δ$ 个 $K$ 中的字符串。我们聚焦于 $\	ext{\mathcal{C}_{s,k}}$，即由最多 $s$ 个状态的确定有限自动机（DFA）在大小为 $k$ 的字母表上识别的语言集合，作为记忆受限学习者的自然假设类。在指数空间范围内，我们证明学习者可以精确识别目标 $K$。在更严格的内存预算下，我们刻画了最强可能的生成保证。特别地，我们提出一种使用 $\	ext{poly}(s,k)$ 空间的流式算法，其收敛到一个生成间隙 $Δ= O(k^{2s-2})$ 的假设。此外，所学假设语言包含了 $K$ 中所有长度至少为 $2s-1$ 的字符串。我们通过从标准通信复杂性问题的归约，给出了一个近乎匹配的下界：要实现生成间隙 $Δ\\
leq k^{(1-\	ext{\varepsilon})s}$，需要 $k^{Ω(\	ext{\varepsilon} s)}$ 的内存。综上，这些结果揭示了多项式空间生成与指数空间精确识别之间的一次尖锐转变。

summary: Computer-use agents turn vision-language model (VLM) predictions into executable GUI clicks, so reliable uncertainty estimates are essential for rejection, calibration, miss-severity ranking, and spatial safety regions. Yet evidence on post-hoc uncertainty quantification (UQ) for these agents is fragmented across isolated model and dataset pairs, leaving it unclear whether UQ rankings stay stable when the agent, benchmark, or observable interface changes. We present Argus, a cross-regime benchmark for post-hoc UQ in single-step executable GUI grounding: a 27-method open-weight matrix over 4 VLM agents and 4 datasets, plus an 8-method closed-source matrix across 3 frontier vendors where logits, hidden states, and attention maps are unavailable. Evaluated methods span logit-based scores, sampling and consistency measures, hidden-state and density estimators (Mahalanobis, SAPLMA), attention-based scores, P(True) and verbalised-confidence prompting, and split-conformal prediction. The main finding is selective transfer: UQ rankings are stable across datasets for a fixed model, but degrade across model classes and observable interfaces. Hidden-state and density methods are the most stable open-weight family, while CoCoA-1MCA, Focus, sampling-based scores, and verbalised self-assessment win in specific regimes. Within-model ranking transfer is strong (Spearman rho up to 0.969), but cross-tier transfer to closed-source vendors averages only +0.08, so closed-source UQ should be reranked on the target rather than extrapolated. Conformal click regions show score-level discrimination is not enough for deployment: locally weighted disks shrink radii by 40-60% when the plug-in UQ is calibrated, but coverage degrades under calibration-test or interface mismatch. We release per-item records, calibration/test splits, UQ scores, and analysis scripts for regime-aware UQ selection in GUI agents.
title: Uncertainty Quantification for Computer-Use Agents: A Benchmark across Vision-Language Models and GUI Grounding Datasets
title_translated: 计算机使用智能体的不确定性量化：跨视觉-语言模型与GUI定位数据集的基准测试
summary_translated: 计算机使用智能体将视觉-语言模型（VLM）的预测转化为可执行的GUI点击操作，因此可靠的不确定性估计对于拒绝、校准、误检严重性排序和空间安全区域至关重要。然而，现有针对这些智能体的事后不确定性量化（UQ）研究分散在孤立的模型与数据集组合中，尚不清楚当智能体、基准或可观测界面发生变化时，UQ排名是否保持稳定。我们提出了Argus，一个面向单步可执行GUI定位的事后UQ跨范式基准：包含4个VLM智能体和4个数据集的27种方法开放权重矩阵，以及涵盖3个前沿供应商的8种方法封闭源码矩阵（其中无法获取logits、隐藏状态和注意力图）。评估的方法包括基于logits的评分、采样与一致性度量、隐藏状态与密度估计器（Mahalanobis, SAPLMA）、基于注意力的评分、P(True)和口语化置信提示，以及分拆共形预测。主要发现为选择性迁移：固定模型下，UQ排名在不同数据集间保持稳定，但在模型类别和可观测界面间退化。隐藏状态与密度方法在开放权重族中最为稳定，而CoCoA-1MCA、Focus、基于采样的评分和口语化自我评估在特定场景中表现最佳。模型内排名迁移能力强（Spearman相关系数最高达0.969），但跨层级迁移至封闭源供应商平均仅提升+0.08，因此封闭源UQ应在目标环境重新排序而非外推。共形点击区域显示，仅在评分层面区分不足以部署：当插件式UQ被校准时，局部加权圆盘半径缩小40%-60%，但校准测试或界面不匹配下覆盖率下降。我们公开了每项记录、校准/测试划分、UQ评分及分析脚本，以支持GUI智能体中情境感知的UQ选择。

summary: Safety evaluation of large language models (LLMs) is commonly performed by querying models with unsafe or jailbreak prompts and judging whether their outputs violate a safety policy. Although useful, output-level evaluation is expensive, sensitive to judge choice, and easily tied to fixed question banks. We propose **SafeVec**, a white-box evaluation procedure that measures safety from internal representations rather than generated answers. **SafeVec** first extracts layer-wise refusal directions from a safety-aligned reference model, then selects stable layer windows where safe and unsafe behaviors are separable, and finally scores a target model by measuring whether its hidden states align with these refusal directions under unsafe and jailbreak prompts. The resulting metric, **RAS** (**R**efusal **A**lignment **S**core), maps representation-level refusal alignment to a calibrated 0-100 safety score. Across `Llama`, `Gemma`, and `Qwen` model families, RAS separates aligned models from uncensored and abliterated variants, tracks output-level attack success rate, and is substantially faster than judge-based evaluation. These results suggest that refusal alignment provides a compact and efficient signal for white-box LLM safety evaluation.
title: RAS: Measuring LLM Safety Through Refusal Alignment
title_translated: 通过拒绝对齐衡量大语言模型安全性：SafeVec方法
summary_translated: 大语言模型（LLMs）的安全性评估通常通过向模型提出不安全或越狱提示，并判断其输出是否违反安全策略来完成。尽管有效，这种输出层面的评估成本高、对评判者选择敏感，且易受限于固定的问答库。我们提出**SafeVec**，一种白盒评估方法，从内部表示而非生成答案中测量安全性。**SafeVec**首先从一个经过安全对齐的参考模型中提取逐层拒绝方向，然后选择能够分离安全与不安全行为的稳定层窗口，最后通过测量目标模型在不安全和越狱提示下的隐藏状态是否与这些拒绝方向对齐来评分。由此得到的指标——**RAS**（**R**efusal **A**lignment **S**core）——将表示层面的拒绝对齐映射为校准后的0-100安全分数。在`Llama`、`Gemma`和`Qwen`等多个模型家族中，RAS能有效区分对齐模型与未过滤及被破坏的变体，跟踪输出层面攻击成功率，且远快于依赖人工评判的评估方式。结果表明，拒绝对齐为白盒LLM安全性评估提供了一个紧凑而高效的信号。

summary: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) systems are vulnerable to corpus poisoning attacks that manipulate model outputs through malicious retrieved documents. Existing detection methods typically rely on auxiliary classifiers or additional LLM-based verification, introducing substantial computational overhead. We present TRACE, a lightweight detection framework that identifies poisoning attacks by tracing answer-related tokens through token influence attribution. TRACE first discovers recurrent high-influence keywords across retrieved documents and then performs a secondary verification to confirm their influence on model predictions. Experiments on three QA benchmarks and six LLMs demonstrate strong detection performance while simultaneously uncovering attacker-specified target answers.
title: Tracing Target Answers in Poisoned Retrieval Corpora via Token Influence Attribution
title_translated: 通过标记影响归因追踪中毒检索语料库中的目标答案
summary_translated: 检索增强生成（RAG）系统容易受到语料库投毒攻击，攻击者通过恶意检索文档操纵模型输出。现有检测方法通常依赖辅助分类器或额外的LLM验证，带来显著计算开销。我们提出TRACE，一种轻量级检测框架，通过标记影响归因追踪答案相关标记来识别投毒攻击。TRACE首先在检索文档中发现反复出现的高影响力关键词，然后进行二次验证以确认这些关键词对模型预测的影响。在三个问答基准和六种LLM上的实验表明，该方法具有强大的检测性能，同时能够揭示攻击者指定的目标答案。

summary: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) has emerged as a dominant paradigm for enhancing large language models with external knowledge. By coupling retrieval mechanisms with generative models, RAG systems improve factual grounding and adaptability across domains. However, integrating retrieval pipelines introduces new security and privacy risks that extend beyond conventional language modeling threats. Sensitive information may be exposed through retrieval indices, query logs, context construction, or federated updates, while adversarial manipulation of knowledge bases can undermine trust in generated outputs. This survey provides a comprehensive examination of privacy and security challenges across RAG systems deployed in centralized, on-device (Micro-RAG), federated, and hybrid paradigms. We present a unified taxonomy of threat surfaces spanning the retrieval, context construction, and generation stages and systematically analyze attack classes, including membership inference, index inference, poisoning, gradient leakage, and collusion. We further review architectural, algorithmic, and cryptographic defenses, highlighting privacy-utility trade-offs and deployment considerations. Finally, we outline open research challenges toward building trustworthy, secure, and resilient RAG systems for real-world applications.
title: Security and Privacy in Retrieval-Augmented Generation: Architectures, Threats, Defenses, and Future Directions for Building Trustworthy Systems
title_translated: 检索增强生成中的安全与隐私：架构、威胁、防御及构建可信系统的未来方向
summary_translated: 检索增强生成（RAG）已成为增强大语言模型外部知识能力的主导范式。通过将检索机制与生成模型结合，RAG系统提升了事实依据性和跨领域适应性。然而，集成检索流程引入了超越传统语言建模威胁的新安全与隐私风险。敏感信息可能通过检索索引、查询日志、上下文构建或联邦更新暴露，而知识库的对抗性操纵会削弱对生成输出的信任。本综述全面考察了集中式、设备端（Micro-RAG）、联邦及混合范式下RAG系统的隐私与安全挑战。我们提出了一个统一的威胁面分类体系，涵盖检索、上下文构建和生成阶段，并系统分析了各类攻击，包括成员推断、索引推断、投毒、梯度泄露和合谋攻击。我们进一步回顾了架构、算法和密码学防御措施，强调隐私-效用权衡与部署考量。最后，我们指出了迈向真实世界应用中可信、安全、鲁棒RAG系统所需解决的开放研究问题。

summary: Software performance optimization is a notoriously complex and manual task. Despite the growing use of Large Language Models (LLMs) for code refinement, we still lack benchmarks that capture how optimization actually happens in real-world codebases. Existing frameworks often oversimplify the problem by focusing on isolated functions or a single performance metric, missing the critical trade-offs between execution time and memory footprint, the inherent noise of the measurement environment, and the variability introduced by different input data and execution conditions. We address this by introducing SWE-Pro, a repository-level benchmark derived from 102 expert-written optimizations from open-source projects. Unlike previous benchmarks, SWE-Pro pairs each task with parameterized tests to evaluate runtime, peak memory, and Time-Weighted Memory Usage (TWMU) across varying input data and execution conditions under noise-aware measurement conditions. Our evaluation shows that current LLMs struggle significantly: runtime gains are negligible, and memory optimizations are nearly non-existent. This stands in sharp contrast to expert implementations, which achieve an aggregate speedup of 15.5x and peak memory reduction of 171.3x over benchmark tasks. Expert-written improvements are observed in 91.2% of tasks for runtime and 65.7% for peak memory. Our findings expose a substantial gap between current LLM capabilities and the demands of expert-level engineering.
title: Evaluating LLMs on Real-World Software Performance Optimization
title_translated: 评估大语言模型在真实世界软件性能优化中的表现
summary_translated: 软件性能优化是一项众所周知的复杂且手动的任务。尽管大语言模型（LLMs）在代码优化中的应用日益广泛，但我们仍缺乏能真实反映实际代码库中优化过程的基准。现有框架往往通过聚焦孤立函数或单一性能指标过度简化问题，忽略了执行时间与内存占用之间的关键权衡、测量环境的固有噪声，以及不同输入数据和执行条件带来的变异性。为此，我们引入SWE-Pro，一个源自102个开源项目中专家编写优化的仓库级基准。与以往基准不同，SWE-Pro为每个任务配备参数化测试，在噪声感知的测量条件下评估运行时间、峰值内存和时间加权内存使用量（TWMU）在不同输入数据和执行条件下的表现。我们的评估显示，当前LLMs表现显著不足：运行时间改善微乎其微，内存优化几乎不存在。这与专家实现形成鲜明对比——专家方案在基准任务上实现了15.5倍的整体加速和峰值内存降低171.3倍。在运行时间方面，专家改进出现在91.2%的任务中；在峰值内存方面为65.7%。研究结果揭示了当前LLM能力与专家级工程需求之间的巨大差距。

summary: Large language models (LLMs) reach high accuracy in mathematical reasoning, but individual traces on the same problem diverge; some arrive at the correct answer while others fail. Prior work analyzes failure at the step, chunk, or sentence level, or at tokens where failure has already occurred. Neither identifies the precise token that triggers the shift toward failure. We introduce the cliff token, a token where the token-wise potential drops significantly under an adaptive threshold that scales with the local token-wise potential, based on a one-sided two-proportion z-test. Across seven models and three mathematical reasoning benchmarks (GSM1K, MATH500, AIME 2025), cliff tokens act as failure triggers; deleting the first cliff token and resampling recovers pass@64 to 1.0, while keeping it limits recovery to between 0.71 and 1.00. We further introduce a cliff taxonomy of deterministic, uncertain, and sampled-off cliffs, defined by greedy choice and token entropy. Each type has distinct probabilistic characteristics, and the taxonomy generalizes across model scales. Finally, we validate the taxonomy via single-token preference optimization at cliff positions (Cliff-DPO). Trained on GSM8K, Cliff-DPO improves accuracy across benchmarks by up to +6.6. Optimizing at uncertain and sampled-off cliffs improves reasoning, while deterministic cliffs do not.
title: Cliff Tokens: Identifying Single-Token Failure Triggers in LLM Mathematical Reasoning
title_translated: 悬崖令牌：识别大语言模型数学推理中的单令牌失败触发器
summary_translated: 大型语言模型（LLMs）在数学推理中达到高准确率，但同一问题的各个推理路径却存在差异；一些路径得出正确答案，而另一些则失败。以往研究在步骤、片段或句子层面分析失败，或在失败已发生时定位令牌，但均无法精确识别导致失败转变的初始令牌。我们提出‘悬崖令牌’概念，即在自适应阈值下，基于单侧两比例z检验，令牌级潜在值显著下降的令牌。在七个模型和三个数学推理基准（GSM1K、MATH500、AIME 2025）上，悬崖令牌充当失败触发器；删除首个悬崖令牌并重新采样可使通过率恢复至1.0，而保留则仅能恢复至0.71至1.00之间。我们进一步提出悬崖分类法，包括确定性、不确定性和采样偏离三类，由贪婪选择和令牌熵定义。每类具有不同的概率特征，且该分类法在不同模型规模间具有泛化能力。最后，我们通过在悬崖位置进行单令牌偏好优化（Cliff-DPO）验证该分类法。在GSM8K上训练的Cliff-DPO在多个基准上提升准确率最高达+6.6。在不确定性和采样偏离悬崖处优化可改善推理，而确定性悬崖则无此效果。

summary: Recent advances in sequence modeling have significantly improved ASR systems, bringing them close to human-level recognition accuracy and enhancing robustness across diverse acoustic conditions and languages. In contrast, Forced Alignment has not experienced comparable progress, and traditional HMM-GMM frameworks remain widely adopted and highly competitive.   To address this gap, we propose an end-to-end, fully differentiable neural architecture specifically designed for phoneme alignment. The model consists of an encoder that processes the input signal and a decoder that produces alignment decisions. The encoder is structured into two complementary branches: one dedicated to phoneme identity verification and the other to phoneme boundary detection. The decoder is implemented as a trainable module based on differentiable soft dynamic programming. The entire system is optimized end-to-end using a novel contrastive loss that encourages clear separation between steady-state phoneme regions and transition boundaries.   The proposed approach outperforms the current state of the art in phoneme alignment on hand-annotated English benchmarks, achieves strong word-level generalization results, and demonstrates generalization on unseen languages.
title: Fully Differentiable Neural Forced Alignment via Soft Dynamic Programming
comment: This work has been submitted to the IEEE for a possible publication
title_translated: 基于软动态规划的全可微神经强制对齐
summary_translated: 序列建模的最新进展显著提升了自动语音识别（ASR）系统性能，使其接近人类水平的识别准确率，并增强了在多样声学条件和语言下的鲁棒性。相比之下，强制对齐技术并未取得相应进步，传统HMM-GMM框架仍被广泛采用且极具竞争力。为弥合这一差距，我们提出一种端到端、全可微的神经架构，专为音素对齐设计。该模型包含一个处理输入信号的编码器和一个生成对齐决策的解码器。编码器分为两个互补分支：一个用于音素身份验证，另一个用于音素边界检测。解码器基于可微软动态规划实现为可训练模块。整个系统使用一种新颖的对比损失进行端到端优化，以促进稳态音素区域与过渡边界的清晰分离。所提方法在人工标注的英语基准上优于当前最先进的音素对齐技术，实现了强大的词级泛化能力，并在未见语言上表现出良好泛化性能。

summary: Traditional evaluations measure a learning algorithm's final performance on an i.i.d. test set, reducing learning to a single aggregate score. This approach obscures a fundamental question: to what extent does learning from a specific example generalize to others? Such per-sample generalization, akin to learning by analogy in human cognition, captures how far the knowledge extracted from one example can transfer, yet remains invisible to standard benchmarks. We introduce the Generalization Spectrum, an evaluation framework designed to expose this hidden dimension. For each training example, we construct a controlled suite of test variants arranged by increasing transfer distance, from exact recall to implementation transfer across languages, context transfer under complete narrative re-framing, category-matched in-domain problems, and an unpaired baseline. By tracking performance across these distances, we reveal not just whether an algorithm learns, but how far that learning extends. We instantiate this framework on competitive programming, using a selection-and-synthesis pipeline seeded with recent problems to mitigate contamination. We first compare three canonical learning paradigms under matched memorization. RL converts memorization into near-transfer more efficiently than SFT-family baselines, while ICL exhibits strong but correspondence-dependent transfer. We then use the Spectrum to diagnose within-family variants. The resulting profiles show that local gains need not expand the generalization radius: abstractions and hints mainly lift local transfer, RFT preserves a stronger far-transfer tail than reference SFT, and self-distillation or hint-assisted RL can reduce far transfer even when local transfer or optimization improves.
title: The Generalization Spectrum: A Chromatographic Approach to Evaluating Learning Algorithms
title_translated: 泛化谱：一种基于色谱分析的算法评估方法
summary_translated: 传统评估仅测量学习算法在独立同分布测试集上的最终性能，将学习简化为单一综合得分。这种方法掩盖了一个根本问题：从特定示例中学习的知识能在多大程度上泛化到其他示例？这种逐样本泛化类似于人类认知中的类比学习，捕捉了从一个例子中提取的知识能够迁移的距离，但标准基准难以揭示这一点。我们引入‘泛化谱’评估框架，旨在揭示这一隐藏维度。对于每个训练样本，我们构建一组按迁移距离递增的测试变体：从精确回忆，到跨语言实现迁移，再到完全叙事重构下的上下文迁移，类别匹配的域内问题，以及无配对基线。通过跟踪这些距离上的性能表现，不仅揭示算法是否学习，还揭示其学习的扩展范围。我们在编程竞赛任务中实例化该框架，使用近期问题作为种子，以减轻数据污染。首先，在匹配记忆条件下比较三种典型学习范式：强化学习（RL）比SFT类基线更高效地将记忆转化为近似迁移，而上下文学习（ICL）表现出强但依赖对应关系的迁移。随后，利用泛化谱诊断家族内部变体。结果表明，局部性能提升并不必然扩大泛化半径：抽象和提示主要提升局部迁移，RFT在远距离迁移尾部表现优于参考SFT，而自蒸馏或提示辅助的强化学习即使在局部迁移或优化改善时，也可能削弱远距离迁移能力。

summary: Tool-integrated LLM agents are often wrapped within a harness: the scaffolding that determines which tools are exposed, how they are described, and what auxiliary information accompanies each per-step observation. While agents are routinely post-trained, this scaffolding is typically treated as a fixed engineering detail, with design effort limited to the training-free regime. Moreover, existing post-training algorithms assume a static environment, even though tool environments and tasks often shift upon deployment. To address this gap, we extend $\texttt{ALFWorld}$ (i) to treat the harness as a controllable design dimension and (ii) to support evaluation under task and tool environment shifts. Building on this, we systematically analyze how the harness design influences post-training in both in-distribution and out-of-distribution (OOD) settings. We empirically show that harness-aware post-training not only improves in-distribution performance but also enables agents to robustly adapt to OOD settings. Under a harness with minimal design effort, post-training suffers a drastic performance drop under stronger tool environment shifts, further highlighting the importance of harness-aware post-training under such shifts.
title: The Interplay of Harness Design and Post-Training in LLM Agents
title_translated: Harness设计与大语言模型智能体后训练的相互作用
summary_translated: 集成工具的大语言模型智能体通常被封装在一种harness（支架）中：即决定暴露哪些工具、如何描述它们以及每一步观察伴随哪些辅助信息的结构框架。尽管智能体常进行后训练，但该支架通常被视为固定的工程细节，设计工作局限于无训练阶段。此外，现有后训练算法假设环境静态，而实际工具环境和任务在部署后往往发生变化。为解决这一差距，我们扩展了$	exttt{ALFWorld}$（i）将harness视为可控的设计维度，（ii）支持在任务和工具环境变化下的评估。在此基础上，我们系统分析了harness设计在分布内和分布外（OOD）设置下对后训练的影响。实证表明，感知harness的后训练不仅提升分布内性能，还能使智能体稳健适应分布外场景。在设计投入最少的harness下，后训练在更强的工具环境变化下性能急剧下降，进一步凸显了在环境变化下进行harness感知后训练的重要性。

summary: Connecting a pre-trained speech encoder to a Large Language Model (LLM) is the standard architecture for building Speech LLMs. However, a structural misalignment exists between the encoder and the LLM. Unlike encoders based on automatic speech recognition, which often produce representations in separate language-specific spaces, LLMs operate within a unified language-agnostic space. A mechanism is required to align the encoder's language-specific representations with the LLM's shared space. We argue that speech translation provides a principled way to achieve this. Unlike monolingual transcription, translation requires the model to bridge different languages and learn language-agnostic representations. We experimentally evaluate the impact of incorporating translation objectives into speech encoder pre-training. Our results demonstrate that translation-enhanced pre-training improves cross-modal integration and leads to superior performance across downstream Speech LLM tasks.
title: Does Translation-Enhanced Speech Encoder Pre-training Affect Speech LLMs?
title_translated: 翻译增强的语音编码器预训练是否影响语音大语言模型？
summary_translated: 将预训练的语音编码器与大语言模型（LLM）连接是构建语音LLM的标准架构。然而，编码器与LLM之间存在结构性错位。不同于基于自动语音识别的编码器通常产生语言特定空间的表示，LLM运行于统一的、语言无关的空间中。需要一种机制将编码器的语言特定表示对齐到LLM的共享空间。我们认为，语音翻译提供了一种合理的解决方案。与单语转录不同，翻译要求模型跨越不同语言并学习语言无关表示。我们实验评估了在语音编码器预训练中引入翻译目标的影响。结果表明，翻译增强的预训练提升了跨模态整合能力，并在下游语音LLM任务中带来更优表现。

summary: Dialogue systems based on large language models (LLMs) have advanced significantly in recent years. However, dialectal variation remains a major challenge, particularly for systems that process spoken input. LLM-based speech language models (SLMs), which integrate LLMs with speech processing components, show promise for spoken language tasks, yet their ability to comprehend dialects has not been sufficiently studied. Moreover, it remains unclear how the dialectal understanding of the base LLM affects SLM performance. This study investigates the dialectal robustness of both LLMs and SLMs using Japanese dialects as a test case. We define robustness as the ratio of performance on dialectal versus standard inputs, enabling fair comparisons. Our experiments show that SLM robustness correlates with that of their text-based counterparts. Furthermore, training with dialectal data and fine-tuning the speech encoder each improves robustness in SLMs.
title: Evaluating Japanese Dialect Robustness Across Speech and Text-based Large Language Models
title_translated: 基于日语方言的语音与文本型大语言模型鲁棒性评估
summary_translated: 近年来，基于大语言模型（LLM）的对话系统取得了显著进展。然而，方言差异仍然是一个主要挑战，尤其是在处理语音输入的系统中。结合大语言模型与语音处理组件的语音语言模型（SLM）在语音任务中展现出潜力，但其对方言的理解能力尚未得到充分研究。此外，基础LLM的方言理解能力如何影响SLM性能仍不明确。本研究以日语方言为测试案例，探讨了LLM和SLM的方言鲁棒性。我们将鲁棒性定义为方言输入与标准输入性能的比率，从而实现公平比较。实验表明，SLM的鲁棒性与其对应的文本型模型表现相关。此外，使用方言数据进行训练以及微调语音编码器均能提升SLM的鲁棒性。

summary: Diffusion-based text-to-speech (TTS) models have achieved significant improvements in speech quality. However, modeling sharp prosodic transitions and rapid pitch variations in expressive speech remains challenging. Existing diffusion-based TTS decoders commonly utilize periodic nonlinearities such as Snake activation function to capture harmonic structures, but this activation funcation provides limited adaptability when modeling abrupt amplitude and frequency variations. In this paper, we investigate the role of oscillatory inductive bias in diffusion-based TTS decoders and introduce an adaptive oscillatory nonlinearity that enables controllable periodic modulation while maintaining signal stability through a linear bypass component. We refer the resulting TTS system as OscillaTTS. Experiments on the LJSpeech and Emotional Speech Dataset show consistent improvements across objective and subjective evaluations, indicating improved modeling of expressive prosodic dynamics.
title: Adaptive Oscillatory Inductive Bias for Modeling Sharp Prosodic Dynamics in Diffusion-Based TTS
title_translated: 用于建模扩散模型语音合成中尖锐韵律动态的自适应振荡归纳偏置
summary_translated: 基于扩散模型的文语转换（TTS）系统在语音质量方面取得了显著进步。然而，建模富有表现力语音中的尖锐韵律过渡和快速音高变化仍具挑战性。现有的基于扩散的TTS解码器通常采用周期性非线性激活函数（如Snake函数）来捕捉谐波结构，但在建模突然的幅度和频率变化时适应性有限。本文研究了振荡归纳偏置在基于扩散的TTS解码器中的作用，并提出一种自适应振荡非线性函数，能够在保持信号稳定性的同时实现可控的周期调制。由此构建的TTS系统称为OscillaTTS。在LJSpeech和情感语音数据集上的实验显示，客观与主观评价均一致提升，表明其在表达性韵律动态建模方面具有优势。

summary: While large language model (LLM)-based text-to-speech (TTS) systems have achieved high-quality speech synthesis, most existing systems focus on English and Chinese. Japanese, however, remains under-explored, and its unique linguistic challenges, such as widespread context-dependent kanji polyphony, have yet to be adequately tackled. Here we introduce Sarashina2.2-TTS (https://github.com/sbintuitions/sarashina2.2-tts), a Japanese-centric LLM-TTS system that tackles these challenges through a dual approach: data strategy and evaluation methodology. First, we scale training to approximately 361k hours of speech, incorporating a balanced mix of Japanese and English data. Furthermore, we design a targeted data augmentation pipeline covering all 2,136 Joyo (regular-use) kanji designated by Japan's Agency for Cultural Affairs to efficiently address kanji polyphony disambiguation. Second, we introduce the Joyo Kanji Yomi Benchmark (https://github.com/sbintuitions/JoyoKanji-Yomi-Benchmark), covering all 2,136 Joyo kanji and their 4,378 readings. Alongside this benchmark, we propose Kana-CER, a metric that compares synthesized speech against reference readings in the kana space, eliminating orthographic variations to directly measure pronunciation correctness. Experiments demonstrate that our targeted data augmentation significantly improves reading accuracy. Overall, Sarashina2.2-TTS achieves state-of-the-art kanji-level reading accuracy and matches top baselines on general sentence-level pronunciation, while delivering the highest speaker similarity in zero-shot Japanese speech synthesis. Furthermore, cross-lingual evaluation reveals that Sarashina2.2-TTS is the only system that maintains stable Japanese pronunciation regardless of the prompt language, confirming that our balanced training approach improves cross-lingual robustness.
title: Sarashina2.2-TTS: Tackling Kanji Polyphony in Japanese Speech Generation via Data Scaling and Targeted Data Synthesis
title_translated: Sarashina2.2-TTS：通过数据扩展与定向数据合成应对日语汉字多音现象的语音生成
summary_translated: 尽管基于大语言模型（LLM）的文语转换（TTS）系统已实现高质量语音合成，但现有系统大多聚焦于英语和中文。日语则仍被严重忽视，其独特的语言挑战（如广泛存在的上下文依赖汉字多音现象）尚未得到有效解决。本文介绍Sarashina2.2-TTS（https://github.com/sbintuitions/sarashina2.2-tts），一种面向日语的LLM-TTS系统，通过双重策略应对这些挑战：数据策略与评估方法。首先，将训练规模扩展至约36.1万小时语音，融合均衡的日语与英语数据。其次，设计了一套针对日本文化厅指定的2,136个常用汉字（Joyo kanji）的定向数据增强流程，高效解决汉字多音歧义问题。第二，提出Joyo Kanji Yomi基准（https://github.com/sbintuitions/JoyoKanji-Yomi-Benchmark），覆盖全部2,136个常用汉字及其4,378种读音。同时引入Kana-CER指标，在假名空间中对比合成语音与参考读音，消除书写形式差异，直接衡量发音准确性。实验表明，定向数据增强显著提升了读音准确率。总体而言，Sarashina2.2-TTS在汉字级读音准确率上达到当前最优水平，并在句子级发音上匹配顶尖基线，同时在零样本日语语音合成中实现了最高说话人相似度。跨语言评估还表明，Sarashina2.2-TTS是唯一在不同提示语言下仍能保持稳定日语发音的系统，证实了平衡训练策略对跨语言鲁棒性的提升作用。

summary: Since the 1990s, advancements in big data and information technology have increasingly driven data-centric research in the field of Library and Information Science (LIS). To assess the influence of this data-driven research paradigm on the LIS discipline, this study conducts a fine-grained analysis to uncover the evolutionary trends of research methods within the domain. Using academic papers from LIS published between 1990 and 2022, four key categories of data-driven method entities are automatically extracted: algorithms and models, data resources, software and tools, and metrics. Based on these entities, the study examines the evolution of LIS research methods from three dimensions: the characteristics of research method entities over time, their evolution within different research topics, and the evolutionary features of research method entities across various research methods. The findings highlight data resources as a pivotal driver of methodological evolution in LIS, revealing a cyclical pattern of "emergence-stability/practical application" in the development of research methods within the field.
title: Data-Driven Evolution of Library and Information Science Research Methods (1990-2022): A Perspective Based on Fine-grained Method Entities
title_translated: 图书馆与信息科学研究方法的数据驱动演化（1990–2022）：基于细粒度方法实体的视角
summary_translated: 自1990年代以来，大数据与信息技术的进步日益推动图书馆与信息科学（LIS）领域向数据驱动研究转型。为评估这一数据驱动研究范式对LIS学科的影响，本研究开展细粒度分析，揭示该领域研究方法的演化趋势。基于1990年至2022年间发表的LIS学术论文，自动提取四类数据驱动的方法实体：算法与模型、数据资源、软件与工具、度量指标。基于这些实体，从三个维度考察LIS研究方法的演变：方法实体随时间的特征、不同研究主题内方法实体的演化、以及各类研究方法中方法实体的演化特征。研究发现，数据资源是LIS方法论演化的关键驱动力，揭示出研究方法发展呈现“出现—稳定/实际应用”的循环模式。

summary: With the rapid growth of the number of academic papers, systematically evaluating the difficulty of research and its relationship to academic impact offers important significance for research topic selection and resource allocation. However, current studies lack quantitative assessments of research difficulty and its correlation with academic impact. This paper proposes a comprehensive evaluation system for research difficulty, incorporating factors such as academic collaboration, content, and references. Taking the field of Natural Language Processing (NLP) as a case study, we extract both internal and external features from academic papers, compute multiple research difficulty indicators. We assign their weights using the entropy weight method and perform a weighted sum to obtain the research difficulty score of academic papers. This paper uses the citation frequency of academic papers to measure academic impact. To validate our approach, NLP experts assessed the difficulty of a sample of papers, and correlation analyses confirmed the reliability of our measurement. Empirical results reveal that in NLP, factors such as the number of pages, reference count, and participation of high-level institutions are significantly associated with academic impact. Moreover, we identify an inverted U-shaped relationship between research difficulty and academic impact. It suggests that moderately difficult research tends to achieve greater academic impact.
title: Measuring Research Difficulty of Academic Papers: A Case Study in Natural Language Processing
title_translated: 学术论文研究难度的测量：自然语言处理领域的案例研究
summary_translated: 随着学术论文数量的快速增长，系统评估研究难度及其与学术影响力的关系，对研究选题和资源分配具有重要意义。然而，现有研究缺乏对研究难度的量化评估及其与学术影响力关联的深入分析。本文提出一个综合的研究难度评估体系，整合学术合作、内容特征与参考文献等多重因素。以自然语言处理（NLP）领域为例，从学术论文中提取内外部特征，计算多个研究难度指标。采用熵权法确定各指标权重，并进行加权求和，获得论文的研究难度得分。本文以论文引用频次作为学术影响力的衡量标准。为验证方法有效性，邀请NLP专家对部分论文的难度进行评估，相关性分析确认了测量结果的可靠性。实证结果表明，在NLP领域，论文页数、参考文献数量及高水平机构参与度等因素与学术影响力显著相关。此外，研究发现研究难度与学术影响力之间存在倒U型关系，即适度难度的研究往往能取得更大的学术影响力。

summary: Vision Language Models (VLMs) have shown promising capabilities in medical image analysis by jointly understanding visual and textual information for tasks such as Visual Question Answering. However, existing hematology vision-language resources remain predominantly English centric, limiting their applicability in multilingual healthcare environments. This challenge is releveant generally to South Asia and specifically to Pakistan, where Urdu is widely used despite healthcare information and digital medical systems being largely dependent on English. To investigate this gap, we conducted a survey among healthcare professionals, which revealed substantial language mismatches between clinical documentation and patient communication, emphasizing the need for multilingual healthcare technologies. To address this limitation, we introduce WBCMor VQA, a clinically validated bilingual English, Urdu morphology aware VQA benchmark for leukemia and normal white blood cell analysis. The benchmark is constructed using morphology-aware annotations from LeukemiaAttri and WBCAtt datasets and supported by a domain specific Urdu hematology dictionary to ensure linguistic consistency and clinical correctness. The final benchmark contains 110K bilingual question answer pairs serving as VQA annotations for 20K leukemic and normal single-cell images. Furthermore, we establish baseline performance by evaluating multiple open-source VLMs on the proposed benchmark. The proposed resource aims to facilitate the development of accessible and clinically relevant AI systems for multilingual healthcare environments.
title: Multilingual Hematology Visual Question Answering Dataset
title_translated: 多语言血液学视觉问答数据集
summary_translated: 视觉语言模型（VLMs）在医学图像分析中展现出巨大潜力，能够联合理解视觉和文本信息以完成如视觉问答等任务。然而，现有的血液学视觉语言资源仍主要以英语为中心，限制了其在多语言医疗环境中的应用。这一挑战在南亚地区尤为突出，特别是在巴基斯坦，尽管医疗信息和数字医疗系统高度依赖英语，但乌尔都语却广泛使用。为探究这一差距，我们对医疗专业人员进行了调查，发现临床文档与患者沟通之间存在显著的语言不匹配，凸显了开发多语言医疗技术的必要性。为此，我们提出了WBCMor VQA，一个经过临床验证的双语（英语、乌尔都语）形态感知视觉问答基准，用于白血病和正常白细胞分析。该基准基于LeukemiaAttri和WBCAtt数据集的形态感知标注，并依托领域特定的乌尔都语血液学词典，确保语言一致性和临床准确性。最终基准包含11万对双语问答对，作为2万张白血病和正常单细胞图像的视觉问答标注。此外，我们通过评估多个开源VLMs在该基准上的表现建立了基线性能。所提出的资源旨在促进多语言医疗环境中可访问且具有临床相关性的AI系统的发展。

summary: Hyperparameter Optimization (HPO) is essential for maximizing machine learning model performance, and its core challenge is sample efficiency: finding strong configurations within a limited budget. Because every HPO tool relies on a surrogate prior that imparts its own inductive bias, individual tools struggle once problems become sufficiently diverse and drift from these priors. Motivated by the reasoning and generalization capabilities of LLMs, recent work has explored using LLMs for HPO and reports improved per-iteration performance. Yet these methods share two limitations with a common origin: they use the LLM as a single-tool replacement evaluated by iteration count. (i) Deployed in place of prior tools, the LLM is itself constrained by its pretraining objective to one family of inductive-biased proposals; this single-source setup still fails to handle the full diversity of problems. (ii) Per-iteration evaluation ignores that, in real runs, LLM inference or tool execution is paid serially on top of model evaluation every round, so iteration-count gains do not translate into end-to-end wall-clock gains. We present ASAP, an agent-system co-design that addresses both limitations. On the agent side, ASAP uses the LLM to integrate a diverse pool of inductive-biased optimizers and to select among their proposals each round. On the system side, ASAP re-architects the loop to reduce end-to-end wall-clock while preserving regret quality: a prefix-stable prompt maximizes KV-cache reuse across rounds; speculation parallelism hides the remaining LLM and tool latency under model evaluation via a relative-error accept test; and a Self-Tuner adapts the speculation threshold from execution logs off the critical path. Extensive experiments on diverse modern HPO tasks show that ASAP consistently outperforms baselines, underscoring the value of tool integration and agent-system co-design.
title: ASAP: Agent-System Co-Design for Wall-Clock-Centered Auto HPO Research for ML Experiments
title_translated: ASAP：面向机器学习实验的时钟中心自动超参数优化的智能体-系统协同设计
summary_translated: 超参数优化（HPO）对于最大化机器学习模型性能至关重要，其核心挑战在于样本效率：在有限预算内找到高性能配置。由于每种HPO工具都依赖于一个代理先验，从而引入自身的归纳偏置，当问题变得足够多样化并偏离这些先验时，单一工具便难以应对。受大语言模型（LLM）推理与泛化能力的启发，近期研究探索使用LLM进行HPO，并报告了每次迭代性能的提升。然而，这些方法存在两个源于共同根源的局限性：它们将LLM作为单一工具替代品，仅以迭代次数为评价标准。（i）作为先前提前训练目标的产物，LLM本身受限于一类归纳偏置的提议，这种单源设置仍无法处理问题的全部多样性；（ii）按迭代评估忽略了真实运行中LLM推理或工具执行需在每轮模型评估后串行支付开销，因此迭代数的提升并不能转化为端到端的时钟时间收益。我们提出ASAP，一种解决这两个局限的智能体-系统协同设计。在智能体层面，ASAP利用LLM整合多样化的归纳偏置优化器，并在每轮中从其提议中进行选择；在系统层面，ASAP重构循环以减少端到端时钟时间，同时保持遗憾质量：通过前缀稳定的提示最大化跨轮次的KV缓存复用；通过相对误差接受测试实现推测并行，隐藏剩余的LLM和工具延迟；并通过自调优模块从非关键路径的执行日志中动态调整推测阈值。在多种现代HPO任务上的大量实验表明，ASAP持续优于基线，凸显了工具集成与智能体-系统协同设计的价值。

summary: Long-term robot deployment requires a compact and scalable memory that preserves fine-grained visual semantics, grounds observations in space and time, and enables efficient storage and retrieval. In this paper, we propose RAVEN, an agentic memory system for long-horizon robotic question answering and navigation. RAVEN stores visual embeddings with pose and time in a vector database, and grounds retrieval in a spatial map to answer queries and navigate to goals. By operating directly on visual embeddings, RAVEN avoids lossy image-to-text captioning and enables accurate semantic, spatial, and temporal retrieval at scale. Across several simulated and real-world video question-answering benchmarks, RAVEN consistently surpasses caption-based memory systems and matches frontier VLMs on long-horizon tasks at 10$\times$ lower retrieval cost. Finally, we instantiate RAVEN on a Unitree Go1 robot for the task of long-horizon navigation for natural language goal-reaching, and show successful deployment over several large indoor environments.
title: RAVEN: Long-Horizon Reasoning & Navigation with a Visuo-Spatio-Temporal Memory
title_translated: RAVEN：基于视觉时空记忆的长时程推理与导航
summary_translated: 长期机器人部署需要一种紧凑且可扩展的记忆系统，能够保留细粒度的视觉语义，将观测结果在空间和时间上定位，并支持高效存储与检索。本文提出RAVEN，一种用于长时程机器人问答与导航的智能体记忆系统。RAVEN将视觉嵌入、姿态和时间信息存储于向量数据库中，并通过空间地图对检索进行定位，以回答查询并导航至目标。通过直接操作视觉嵌入，RAVEN避免了有损的图像到文本描述转换，实现了大规模下的精确语义、空间和时间检索。在多个模拟和真实世界的视频问答基准测试中，RAVEN始终优于基于描述的记忆系统，并在长时程任务上达到前沿视觉语言模型的表现，同时检索成本降低10倍。最后，我们将RAVEN部署于Unitree Go1机器人，完成了自然语言目标达成的长时程导航任务，在多个大型室内环境中成功运行。

summary: Multi-agent document assessment for retrieval-augmented generation is computationally expensive, driving practitioners toward smaller, deployable models whose assessment mechanisms remain poorly understood. We conduct a controlled study of training-free interventions on 7B-9B instruction-tuned models across diverse QA benchmarks, revealing a sharp dichotomy in how models benefit from assessment.
